<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Process\Exception; use Symfony\Component\Process\Messenger\RunProcessContext; /** * @author Kevin Bond <kevinbond@gmail.com> */ final class RunProcessFailedException extends RuntimeException { public function __construct(ProcessFailedException $exception, public readonly RunProcessContext $context) { parent::__construct($exception->getMessage(), $exception->getCode()); } }
